oraclePrices.note: Admin-pushed prices. PEPT-USD/LLY-PERP/TSHA-PERP have no real source (30-day staleness). SEMA-PERP/GLP1-IDX-PERP/TIRZ-PERP/RETA-PERP are bootstrapped from real PeptidePricing.com + PeptideScouter.com cross-vendor medians (48h staleness — must be refreshed at least every 2 days to stay tradeable; run scripts/push-glp1-prices.ts). GLP1-BASKET (old stock-ticker theme) retired in favor of GLP1-IDX-PERP.
oraclePrices.TIRZ-PERP: 5.5 USD/mg (reference only, not tradeable — Coming Soon)
oraclePrices.RETA-PERP: 6.37 USD/mg (reference only, not tradeable — Coming Soon)
oraclePrices.stalenessWindow: 30 days default (pushed, no real source), 48h (real peptide markets), 15 minutes (Chainlink)

mainnetReferences.note: Addresses verified on Robinhood Chain mainnet (chain 4663, rpc.mainnet.chain.robinhood.com) for future migration — NOT usable on testnet.

notes: PerpsEngine deployed and configured with tPUSD test collateral for all 4 markets. BondDepository still has no reserve token whitelisted (no real Stock Token exists on testnet).

plp.note: GMX-style LP vault. OI capped at 50% of AUM. Fees + losses to LPs; profits paid from pool.
